title: Google Docs read_excerpt
description: Read a bounded document excerpt with optional heading outline.

document_id.description: Google Docs document ID, same as the Drive file ID.

query.description: Optional text to find. The excerpt starts near the first match when found.

start_char.description: Character offset used when query is omitted or not found. Defaults to 0.

include_outline.description: Include compact heading outline. Defaults to true.
